category_sources: source_facts.description says lightweight extensible database access library in C; official Linuxnetworks page says OpenDBX provides a database abstraction layer for supported databases.
display_name_sources: Official Linuxnetworks project page title is OpenDBX; source_facts.name is opendbx.
docs_sources: Official Linuxnetworks OpenDBX wiki page contains setup, usage, C API, C++ API, supported data types, command-line utility, and resources.
repo_sources: Official Linuxnetworks OpenDBX resources list an SVN repository at libopendbx.svn.sourceforge.net; source_facts.source-archive is an official linuxnetworks.de release tarball.
tags_sources: Official Linuxnetworks page describes a database access library in C, abstraction layer, supported databases, C API, C++ API, and SQL data-type documentation.
